person.name: William FitzRichard de Vernon

burialPlace.address: St Werburgh's Church, Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
William was born about 1092. He was the son of Richard De Redviers and Adelise Peverel. He passed away about 1174.

William m. LUCY de Tancarville, daughter of GUILLAUME de Tancarville & his wife Mathilde d'Arques.

William de Vernon (Jun 16 after Sep 1151). "Adeliz of Redvers" donated property to "abbey of St. Mary Monteburgo" for the souls of "my father, William Peverel and his mother, Adeline", with the consent of "my children, Baldwin and William Vernon and Robert of St. Mary Church and his brother of Richard de Redvers to my lord William Peverel of Nottingham and of my children and grandchildren of William Henry and of "by undated charter.

Seigneur de Vernon. The 1130 Pipe Roll records "Willo de Vernun" in Dorsetshire, Wiltshire

"Baldwin earl of Exeter" donated property to the abbey of Sainte-Marie, Montebourg with the consent of "his sons Richard, Henry and his brothers William de Vernone and Robert de Sancte Marie Ecclesia" by charter dated to [1142/55]

zh.lifeSummary: 當William FitzRichard de Vernon於大約1092年出生在英國英格蘭可瓦爾卡迪納姆時，他的父親Richard de Vernon Seigneur de Reviers27歲，母親Adelise de Peverel19歲。他於1112年與Lucy Tancarville在英國爾諾維其結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1174年之前在英國爾希布盧可，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾切斯特聖 維包也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William FitzRichard de Vernon于大约1092年出生在英国英格兰可瓦爾卡迪納姆时，他的父亲Richard de Vernon Seigneur de Reviers27岁，母亲Adelise de Peverel19岁。他于1112年与Lucy Tancarville在英国爾諾維其结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1174年之前在英国爾希布盧可，埋葬在英国英格兰爾切斯特聖 維包也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When William FitzRichard de Vernon was born about 1092, in Cardinham, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard de Vernon Seigneur de Reviers, was 27 and his mother, Adelise de Peverel, was 19. He married Lucy Tancarville in 1112, in Northwich, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died before 1174, in Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, and was buried in St Werburgh's Church, Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William FitzRichard de Vernon est né environ 1092, à Cardinham, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard de Vernon Seigneur de Reviers, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Adelise de Peverel, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Lucy Tancarville en 1112, à Northwich, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé avant 1174, à Shipbrook, Cheshire, Angleterre, et a été enterré à St Werburgh's Church, Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1112 in Northwich, Cheshire, England Lucy Tancarville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. it.lifeSummary: Quando William FitzRichard de Vernon è nato il circa 1092 nel Cardinham, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard de Vernon Seigneur de Reviers, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Adelise de Peverel, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Lucy Tancarville nel 1112, nel Northwich, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: William FitzRichard de Vernonが約1092年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルカーディンハムで生まれた時，父Richard de Vernon Seigneur de Reviersは27歳，母Adelise de Peverelは19歳であった。1112年にイギリスチェシュアイアノースウィチでLucy Tancarvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1174年以前にイギリスチェシュアイアシュイプブルークで死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェスタースト ウエルブルグh'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William FitzRichard de Vernon(이)가 대략 1092년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 카딘함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Vernon Seigneur de Reviers(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelise de Peverel(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1112년 영국 체실르 노르스위치에서 Lucy Tancarville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1174년 이전 영국 체실르 시브룩에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터 스트 워버그h'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William FitzRichard de Vernon nasceu aproximadamente 1092, em Cardinham, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard de Vernon Seigneur de Reviers, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Adelise de Peverel, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Lucy Tancarville em 1112, em Northwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 1174, em Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em St Werburgh's Church, Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William FitzRichard de Vernon родился около 1092 г. в местности кардинам, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard de Vernon Seigneur de Reviers было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelise de Peverel, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Lucy Tancarville в 1112 г. в местности нортвич, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер перед 1174 г. в местности шипбрук, чешир, Англия и был похоронен в местности ст вирбург'с чурч, честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.
